title: Lemonade Inc (LMND) Q4 2023 Earnings Summary
text: Lemonade Inc reported robust fourth-quarter 2023 results on February 27, 2024, demonstrating significant progress toward profitability across multiple financial metrics. The insurer achieved notable year-over-year growth with In-force Premium (IFP): $747 million, up 20%. Revenue: Up 31% compared to Q4 2022. Gross Profit: Surged 165% with margins exceeding 29%. Operating Expenses: Declined 5%, signaling improved efficiency. Net Loss: Improved 33% to $42 million. Adjusted EBITDA: Loss narrowed 44%. Company leadership expressed optimism, stating: We expect to grow faster this year, and to see Adjusted EBITDA continue its upward progression. Lemonade plans to double its growth budget in 2024 and targets cash flow positivity by 2025. The company aims to achieve adjusted EBITDA profitability by 2026. The company's digital and AI-driven approach continues driving operational efficiency improvements in its multi-state insurance operations.
